holdings.infoBox: JPME is an equity ETF with a total of 356 individual holdings. The top holdings are Western Digital stock at 1.10%, Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company at 0.68%, TD SYNNEX at 0.64%, Lumentum Holdings at 0.59%, and Jabil at 0.59%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Diversified Return U.S. Mid Cap Equity ETF (JPME) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund tracks an index of mid-cap US stocks selected using relative value, momentum and quality factors, and for equal risk contribution by sector. JPME was launched on May 11, 2016 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
infoTable: JPMorgan Diversified Factor US Mid Cap Equity Index
